summary: P0-P3 Code Audit Fix Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified 2FA login flow returns JWT (P0), CSRF protection (P1), global error handler (P1), Swagger docs (P2), and input validation (P3). All 62 existing integration tests also pass.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ P0 FIX: 2FA validate endpoint (POST /api/user/2fa/validate) now returns accessToken, refreshToken, session_id, userData when 2FA is valid - verified in twoFactorController.ts lines 104-117
✓ P1: CSRF protection implemented - GET /api/csrf-token returns token, csrfProtection middleware in server.ts line 161
✓ P1: Global error handler catches malformed JSON and returns 400 (not 500) - server.ts lines 116-133
✓ P2: Swagger docs available at /api/docs with updated 2FA validate response schema showing accessToken/refreshToken
✓ P3: Joi validation middleware applied to: login, registerUser, forgot-password, reset-password, changePassword, 2fa/validate
✓ REGRESSION: All 62 existing integration tests pass (authFlows, adminFlows, coreServices, paymentWalletFlows, realTimeEvents)

test_credentials.note: Admin login returns JWT in data.accessToken

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0-P3 fixes verified. The 2FA validate endpoint now correctly returns JWT tokens (accessToken, refreshToken, session_id, userData) on successful validation. CSRF middleware is active with Double Submit Cookie pattern. Malformed JSON requests return 400. Joi validation middleware protects login, register, forgot-password, reset-password, changePassword, and 2fa/validate endpoints. Backend runs on port 8001.

p0_2fa_jwt_response.test: Invalid user_id returns 404, invalid token returns 401

p1_global_error_handler.behavior: SyntaxError with type 'entity.parse.failed' returns 400 instead of 500

p2_swagger_docs.2fa_validate_schema: swagger/paths/security.ts - includes accessToken, refreshToken, session_id, userData in 200 response
